# Urban Prime

Urban Prime is a social marketplace for products, creator videos, Spotlight posts, stores, services, rentals, auctions, and local commerce.

## Public surfaces
- `/` Home and marketplace discovery
- `/spotlight` Prime Spotlight social feed
- `/spotlight/post/:id` Spotlight post detail
- `/reels` Immersive video viewer
- `/pixe` Public Pixe feed
- `/pixe/explore` Pixe exploration feed
- `/pixe/creators` Pixe creator directory
- `/pixe/watch/:videoId` Public Pixe watch page
- `/pixe/channel/:handle` Public Pixe channel page
- `/community` Community surface
- `/browse` Product browsing
- `/browse/services` Service browsing
- `/stores` Store directory
- `/brands` Brand discovery
- `/events` Events and moments
- `/guides` Editorial guides
- `/rewards` Rewards and perks

## Spotlight surfaces
- `/profile/:username` Public creator profile
- `/spotlight/create` Create a Spotlight post

## Notes
- Public pages are indexable.
- Canonical domain: `https://urbanprime.tech`.
- Search, AI, and crawler agents may index public marketplace, Pixe, Spotlight, service, store, profile, and article pages.
- Auth pages, admin pages, and account management pages are intentionally noindexed.
- The sitemap is available at `https://urbanprime.tech/sitemap.xml`.
